Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Event Start wwConfiguracaoImposto.Link() RetornaAutorizacao.Call('WWTABELAIMPOSTO', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod prcGrupoFilialImposto.Call(&Context.EmpCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &ImpCstCofins1 = nullvalue(&ImpCstCofins1) &ImpCstIpi1 = nullvalue(&ImpCstIpi1) &ImpCstPis1 = nullvalue(&ImpCstPis1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPCFOCOD' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &ImpCstCofins2 = nullvalue(&ImpCstCofins2) &ImpCstIpi2 = nullvalue(&ImpCstIpi2) &ImpCstPis2 = nullvalue(&ImpCstPis2) &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'IMPCFOCOD' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &ImpCstCofins3 = nullvalue(&ImpCstCofins3) &ImpCstIpi3 = nullvalue(&ImpCstIpi3) &ImpCstPis3 = nullvalue(&ImpCstPis3) &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'IMPCFOCOD' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = ' Cadastro de Tabela Imposto' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Clear() Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPCOFINSRED' &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(0, "<") &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(1, "=") &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(2, ">") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPCOFINS' &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(0, "<") &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(1, "=") &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(2, ">") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPCBENEF' &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(0, "WWP_FilterLike") &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(1, "WWP_FilterContains") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPALQMVA' &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(0, "<") &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(1, "=") &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(2, ">") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPDIF' &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(0, "<") &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(1, "=") &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(2, ">") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPDTAALT' &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(0, "WWP_FilterPast") &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(1, "WWP_FilterToday") &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(2, "WWP_FilterInTheFuture") &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(3, "WWP_FilterRange") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPIPI' &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(0, "<") &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(1, "=") &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(2, ">") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPPIS' &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(0, "<") &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(1, "=") &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(2, ">") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPPISRED' &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(0, "<") &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(1, "=") &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(2, ">") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPREDALQICMEXT' &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(0, "<") &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(1, "=") &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(2, ">") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPREDALQICMINT' &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(0, "<") &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(1, "=") &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(2, ">") EndCase If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Clear() Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'IMPCOFINSRED' &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(0, "<") &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(1, "=") &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(2, ">") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'IMPCOFINS' &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(0, "<") &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(1, "=") &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(2, ">") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'IMPCBENEF' &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(0, "WWP_FilterLike") &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(1, "WWP_FilterContains") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'IMPALQMVA' &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(0, "<") &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(1, "=") &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(2, ">") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'IMPDIF' &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(0, "<") &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(1, "=") &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(2, ">") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'IMPDTAALT' &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(0, "WWP_FilterPast") &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(1, "WWP_FilterToday") &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(2, "WWP_FilterInTheFuture") &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(3, "WWP_FilterRange") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'IMPIPI' &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(0, "<") &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(1, "=") &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(2, ">") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'IMPPIS' &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(0, "<") &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(1, "=") &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(2, ">") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'IMPPISRED' &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(0, "<") &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(1, "=") &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(2, ">") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'IMPREDALQICMEXT' &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(0, "<") &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(1, "=") &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(2, ">") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'IMPREDALQICMINT' &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(0, "<") &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(1, "=") &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(2, ">") EndCase If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Clear() Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'IMPCOFINSRED' &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(0, "<") &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(1, "=") &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(2, ">") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'IMPCOFINS' &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(0, "<") &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(1, "=") &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(2, ">") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'IMPCBENEF' &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(0, "WWP_FilterLike") &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(1, "WWP_FilterContains") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'IMPALQMVA' &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(0, "<") &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(1, "=") &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(2, ">") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'IMPDIF' &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(0, "<") &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(1, "=") &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(2, ">") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'IMPDTAALT' &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(0, "WWP_FilterPast") &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(1, "WWP_FilterToday") &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(2, "WWP_FilterInTheFuture") &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(3, "WWP_FilterRange") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'IMPIPI' &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(0, "<") &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(1, "=") &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(2, ">") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'IMPPIS' &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(0, "<") &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(1, "=") &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(2, ">") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'IMPPISRED' &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(0, "<") &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(1, "=") &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(2, ">") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'IMPREDALQICMEXT' &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(0, "<") &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(1, "=") &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(2, ">") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'IMPREDALQICMINT' &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(0, "<") &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(1, "=") &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(2, ">") EndCase EndIf EndIf Do 'SaveGridState' &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &Update = !'' &Delete = !'' &Delete.Link = TabelaImposto.Link(TrnMode.Delete, EmpCod, ImpLctCod, ImpFilCod, ImpUfeCod, ImpGruImpCod, ImpCatCod) &add.Clear() &add.AddItem(0, 'WWP_ActionGroupCaption') &add.AddItem(1, 'Log.Alteração') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersOperator1.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPDTAALT' &ImpDtaAlt1.SetEmpty() &ImpDtaAlt_To1.SetEmpty() Do 'UpdateImpDtaAlt1OperatorValues' Grid.Refresh() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersOperator2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'IMPDTAALT' &ImpDtaAlt2.SetEmpty() &ImpDtaAlt_To2.SetEmpty() Do 'UpdateImpDtaAlt2OperatorValues' Grid.Refresh() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersOperator3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'IMPDTAALT' &ImpDtaAlt3.SetEmpty() &ImpDtaAlt_To3.SetEmpty() Do 'UpdateImpDtaAlt3OperatorValues' Grid.Refresh() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &Update.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ CadastroTabelaImposto.PopUp(ImpFilCod, ImpLctCod, ImpUfeCod, ImpGruImpCod, ImpCatCod) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &add.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &add = 1 Do 'Do LogAlteracao' EndCase &add = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event LogAlteracao_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wwLogRegistrosIndividual.Create(&LogErpRegKey, 'TABELAIMPOSTO') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoNewInsert' CadastroTabelaImposto.Popup(&Context.FilCod, 0, '', 0, 0) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoGerarGrupo' wpGerarAtualizarImpostos.Popup(&EmpCod, &ImpFilCod, &ImpUfeCod, &ImpLctCod, &ImpGruImpCod, &ImpCatCod) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoObservacoes' wwTabelaImpostoInformes.Popup() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoImportarTabela' wpExportarTabelaImposto.Link(&EmpCod, &ImpLctCod, &ImpUfeCod, &ImpFilCod, &ImpGruImpCod, 0) //Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoExport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate Excel spreadsheet and download it. Do 'LoadGridState' ExportWWTabelaImposto.Call(&ExcelFilename, &ErrorMessage) If (&ExcelFilename <> "") Link(&ExcelFilename) Else msg(&ErrorMessage) Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ImpCfoCod1.Visible = False &SitCod1.Visible = False &ImpCofinsRed1.Visible = False &ImpCofins1.Visible = False &ImpCBenef1.Visible = False &ImpAlqMVA1.Visible = False &ImpDif1.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersImpDtaAlt1.Visible = False &ImpIPI1.Visible = False &ImpPis1.Visible = False &ImpPisRed1.Visible = False &ImpRedAlqIcmExt1.Visible = False &ImpRedAlqIcmInt1.Visible = False &ImpCstCofins1.Visible = False &ImpCstIpi1.Visible = False &ImpCstPis1.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPCFOCOD' &ImpCfoCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'SITCOD' &SitCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPCOFINSRED' &ImpCofinsRed1.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPCOFINS' &ImpCofins1.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPCBENEF' &ImpCBenef1.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPALQMVA' &ImpAlqMVA1.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPDIF' &ImpDif1.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPDTAALT' TableMergedDynamicFiltersImpDtaAlt1.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = True Do 'UpdateImpDtaAlt1OperatorValues' Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPIPI' &ImpIPI1.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPPIS' &ImpPis1.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPPISRED' &ImpPisRed1.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPREDALQICMEXT' &ImpRedAlqIcmExt1.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPREDALQICMINT' &ImpRedAlqIcmInt1.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPCSTCOFINS' &ImpCstCofins1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPCSTIPI' &ImpCstIpi1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPCSTPIS' &ImpCstPis1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'UpdateImpDtaAlt1OperatorValues' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ ImpDtaAlt_Cell1.Class = !'Invisible' ImpDtaAlt_To_Cell1.Class = !'Invisible' Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = 0 &ImpDtaAlt1 = &Today Case &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = 1 &ImpDtaAlt1 = &Today Case &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = 2 &ImpDtaAlt1 = &Today Case &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = 3 ImpDtaAlt_Cell1.Class = !'' ImpDtaAlt_To_Cell1.Class = !'' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ImpCfoCod2.Visible = False &SitCod2.Visible = False &ImpCofinsRed2.Visible = False &ImpCofins2.Visible = False &ImpCBenef2.Visible = False &ImpAlqMVA2.Visible = False &ImpDif2.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersImpDtaAlt2.Visible = False &ImpIPI2.Visible = False &ImpPis2.Visible = False &ImpPisRed2.Visible = False &ImpRedAlqIcmExt2.Visible = False &ImpRedAlqIcmInt2.Visible = False &ImpCstCofins2.Visible = False &ImpCstIpi2.Visible = False &ImpCstPis2.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'IMPCFOCOD' &ImpCfoCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'SITCOD' &SitCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'IMPCOFINSRED' &ImpCofinsRed2.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'IMPCOFINS' &ImpCofins2.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'IMPCBENEF' &ImpCBenef2.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'IMPALQMVA' &ImpAlqMVA2.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'IMPDIF' &ImpDif2.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'IMPDTAALT' TableMergedDynamicFiltersImpDtaAlt2.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = True Do 'UpdateImpDtaAlt2OperatorValues' Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'IMPIPI' &ImpIPI2.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'IMPPIS' &ImpPis2.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'IMPPISRED' &ImpPisRed2.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'IMPREDALQICMEXT' &ImpRedAlqIcmExt2.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'IMPREDALQICMINT' &ImpRedAlqIcmInt2.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'IMPCSTCOFINS' &ImpCstCofins2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'IMPCSTIPI' &ImpCstIpi2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'IMPCSTPIS' &ImpCstPis2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'UpdateImpDtaAlt2OperatorValues' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ ImpDtaAlt_Cell2.Class = !'Invisible' ImpDtaAlt_To_Cell2.Class = !'Invisible' Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersOperator2 = 0 &ImpDtaAlt2 = &Today Case &DynamicFiltersOperator2 = 1 &ImpDtaAlt2 = &Today Case &DynamicFiltersOperator2 = 2 &ImpDtaAlt2 = &Today Case &DynamicFiltersOperator2 = 3 ImpDtaAlt_Cell2.Class = !'' ImpDtaAlt_To_Cell2.Class = !'' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ImpCfoCod3.Visible = False &SitCod3.Visible = False &ImpCofinsRed3.Visible = False &ImpCofins3.Visible = False &ImpCBenef3.Visible = False &ImpAlqMVA3.Visible = False &ImpDif3.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersImpDtaAlt3.Visible = False &ImpIPI3.Visible = False &ImpPis3.Visible = False &ImpPisRed3.Visible = False &ImpRedAlqIcmExt3.Visible = False &ImpRedAlqIcmInt3.Visible = False &ImpCstCofins3.Visible = False &ImpCstIpi3.Visible = False &ImpCstPis3.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'IMPCFOCOD' &ImpCfoCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'SITCOD' &SitCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'IMPCOFINSRED' &ImpCofinsRed3.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'IMPCOFINS' &ImpCofins3.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'IMPCBENEF' &ImpCBenef3.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'IMPALQMVA' &ImpAlqMVA3.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'IMPDIF' &ImpDif3.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'IMPDTAALT' TableMergedDynamicFiltersImpDtaAlt3.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = True Do 'UpdateImpDtaAlt3OperatorValues' Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'IMPIPI' &ImpIPI3.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'IMPPIS' &ImpPis3.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'IMPPISRED' &ImpPisRed3.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'IMPREDALQICMEXT' &ImpRedAlqIcmExt3.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'IMPREDALQICMINT' &ImpRedAlqIcmInt3.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'IMPCSTCOFINS' &ImpCstCofins3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'IMPCSTIPI' &ImpCstIpi3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'IMPCSTPIS' &ImpCstPis3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'UpdateImpDtaAlt3OperatorValues' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ ImpDtaAlt_Cell3.Class = !'Invisible' ImpDtaAlt_To_Cell3.Class = !'Invisible' Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersOperator3 = 0 &ImpDtaAlt3 = &Today Case &DynamicFiltersOperator3 = 1 &ImpDtaAlt3 = &Today Case &DynamicFiltersOperator3 = 2 &ImpDtaAlt3 = &Today Case &DynamicFiltersOperator3 = 3 ImpDtaAlt_Cell3.Class = !'' ImpDtaAlt_To_Cell3.Class = !'' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'IMPCFOCOD' &ImpCfoCod2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'IMPCFOCOD' &ImpCfoCod3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do LogAlteracao' &LogErpRegKey = trim(str(ImpLctCod)) + ', ' + trim(ImpUfeCod) + ', ' + trim(str(ImpGruImpCod)) + ', ' + trim(str(ImpCatCod)) // wwLogAlteracoes.Popup(&AuditRecordKeyValue, 'TABELAIMPOSTO') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LogAlteracao_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"IMPLCTCOD" &ImpLctCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"IMPUFECOD" &ImpUfeCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"IMPFILCOD" &ImpFilCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"IMPGRUIMPCOD" &ImpGruImpCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"IMPCATCOD" &ImpCatCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPCFOCOD' &ImpCfoCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'SITCOD' &SitCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPCOFINSRED' &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &ImpCofinsRed1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPCOFINS' &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &ImpCofins1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPCBENEF' &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &ImpCBenef1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPALQMVA' &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &ImpAlqMVA1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPDIF' &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &ImpDif1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPDTAALT' &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &ImpDtaAlt1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) &ImpDtaAlt_To1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPIPI' &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &ImpIPI1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPPIS' &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &ImpPis1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPPISRED' &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &ImpPisRed1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPREDALQICMEXT' &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &ImpRedAlqIcmExt1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPREDALQICMINT' &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &ImpRedAlqIcmInt1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPCSTCOFINS' &ImpCstCofins1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPCSTIPI' &ImpCstIpi1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPCSTPIS' &ImpCstPis1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"IMPLCTCOD", "", not &ImpLctCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &ImpLctCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"IMPUFECOD", "", not &ImpUfeCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &ImpUfeCod, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"IMPFILCOD", "", not &ImpFilCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &ImpFilCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"IMPGRUIMPCOD", "", not &ImpGruImpCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &ImpGruImpCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"IMPCATCOD", "", not &ImpCatCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &ImpCatCod.ToString().Trim(), '') Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPCFOCOD' AND not &ImpCfoCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ImpCfoCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'SITCOD' AND not &SitCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &SitCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPCOFINSRED' AND not &ImpCofinsRed1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ImpCofinsRed1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator1 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPCOFINS' AND not &ImpCofins1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ImpCofins1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator1 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPCBENEF' AND not &ImpCBenef1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ImpCBenef1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator1 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPALQMVA' AND not &ImpAlqMVA1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ImpAlqMVA1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator1 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPDIF' AND not &ImpDif1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ImpDif1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator1 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPDTAALT' AND not (&ImpDtaAlt1.IsEmpty() AND &ImpDtaAlt_To1.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ImpDtaAlt1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator1 &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &ImpDtaAlt_To1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPIPI' AND not &ImpIPI1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ImpIPI1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator1 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPPIS' AND not &ImpPis1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ImpPis1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator1 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPPISRED' AND not &ImpPisRed1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ImpPisRed1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator1 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPREDALQICMEXT' AND not &ImpRedAlqIcmExt1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ImpRedAlqIcmExt1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator1 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPREDALQICMINT' AND not &ImpRedAlqIcmInt1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ImpRedAlqIcmInt1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator1 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPCSTCOFINS' AND not &ImpCstCofins1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ImpCstCofins1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPCSTIPI' AND not &ImpCstIpi1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ImpCstIpi1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPCSTPIS' AND not &ImpCstPis1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ImpCstPis1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'IMPCFOCOD' AND not &ImpCfoCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ImpCfoCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'SITCOD' AND not &SitCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &SitCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'IMPCOFINSRED' AND not &ImpCofinsRed2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ImpCofinsRed2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator2 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'IMPCOFINS' AND not &ImpCofins2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ImpCofins2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator2 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'IMPCBENEF' AND not &ImpCBenef2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ImpCBenef2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator2 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'IMPALQMVA' AND not &ImpAlqMVA2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ImpAlqMVA2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator2 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'IMPDIF' AND not &ImpDif2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ImpDif2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator2 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'IMPDTAALT' AND not (&ImpDtaAlt2.IsEmpty() AND &ImpDtaAlt_To2.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ImpDtaAlt2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator2 &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &ImpDtaAlt_To2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'IMPIPI' AND not &ImpIPI2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ImpIPI2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator2 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'IMPPIS' AND not &ImpPis2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ImpPis2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator2 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'IMPPISRED' AND not &ImpPisRed2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ImpPisRed2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator2 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'IMPREDALQICMEXT' AND not &ImpRedAlqIcmExt2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ImpRedAlqIcmExt2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator2 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'IMPREDALQICMINT' AND not &ImpRedAlqIcmInt2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ImpRedAlqIcmInt2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator2 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'IMPCSTCOFINS' AND not &ImpCstCofins2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ImpCstCofins2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'IMPCSTIPI' AND not &ImpCstIpi2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ImpCstIpi2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'IMPCSTPIS' AND not &ImpCstPis2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ImpCstPis2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'IMPCFOCOD' AND not &ImpCfoCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ImpCfoCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'SITCOD' AND not &SitCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &SitCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'IMPCOFINSRED' AND not &ImpCofinsRed3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ImpCofinsRed3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator3 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'IMPCOFINS' AND not &ImpCofins3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ImpCofins3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator3 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'IMPCBENEF' AND not &ImpCBenef3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ImpCBenef3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator3 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'IMPALQMVA' AND not &ImpAlqMVA3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ImpAlqMVA3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator3 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'IMPDIF' AND not &ImpDif3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ImpDif3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator3 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'IMPDTAALT' AND not (&ImpDtaAlt3.IsEmpty() AND &ImpDtaAlt_To3.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ImpDtaAlt3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator3 &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &ImpDtaAlt_To3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'IMPIPI' AND not &ImpIPI3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ImpIPI3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator3 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'IMPPIS' AND not &ImpPis3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ImpPis3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator3 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'IMPPISRED' AND not &ImpPisRed3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ImpPisRed3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator3 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'IMPREDALQICMEXT' AND not &ImpRedAlqIcmExt3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ImpRedAlqIcmExt3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator3 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'IMPREDALQICMINT' AND not &ImpRedAlqIcmInt3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ImpRedAlqIcmInt3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator3 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'IMPCSTCOFINS' AND not &ImpCstCofins3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ImpCstCofins3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'IMPCSTIPI' AND not &ImpCstIpi3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ImpCstIpi3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'IMPCSTPIS' AND not &ImpCstPis3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ImpCstPis3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"TabelaImposto" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub
